mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account_import_batch ( account_group_id, batch_name, source_file_name, import_format, device_os, account_type, ip_region, total_rows, imported_rows, duplicate_rows, format_error_rows, status, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{accountGroupId}, #{batchName}, #{sourceFileName}, #{importFormat}, #{deviceOs}, #{accountType}, #{ipRegion}, #{totalRows}, #{importedRows}, #{duplicateRows}, #{formatErrorRows}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy} )
